assets.alt: The inaccessible fab: a crude PCB home-etched but with vias in the center, 3D printed stopper and measuring, drill bits, soldering around, but behind a blue inaccessible clean room sits The Wafer... out of reach for an ordinary maker :-(

comment_assets.text: Never use your fingerprint for MFA. Makes it more fake at proofs of reality. Use proof of stake, proof of humanity, proof of the knowledge of history, proof of TRUTH. Indeed someone can steal your prints and impersonate you: if anyone ever does here is my proof that I've being framed:
